auditor_address: 650 South Tryon Street, Suite 1800, Charlotte, NC 28202

revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial fees deferred and recognized over expected contract life (~20 years). Ongoing royalty fees recognized over time as franchisees derive value from IP license.
revenue_recognition.system_service_fees: Recognized over time. Combined with franchise fees as single performance obligation (series). Revenue recognized on output method — right to bill based on franchisee hotel revenues (variable consideration).
revenue_recognition.direct_reimbursements: Recognized gross (company acts as principal). Dollar-for-dollar reimbursement.
revenue_recognition.other_revenues: Recognized in period of transaction/event. Includes QA fees, penalties, pre-opening admin, contract termination fees ($2.1M in 2024, $0.2M in 2023).

intangible_assets.franchise_agreements: Amortized straight-line over 20-year estimated useful life. Gross $4.9M, net $3.6M as of 12/31/2024 (10 years remaining).
intangible_assets.software_licenses: Amortized straight-line over remaining non-cancellable contract term. Gross $2.4M, net $1.8M (3 years remaining). Fees may vary based on room count.
intangible_assets.impairment: Reviewed annually and when indicators present. No impairment charges recognized in 2024, 2023, or 2022.

contract_acquisition_costs.method: Direct incremental costs to obtain contracts. Amortized straight-line over initial non-cancellable term or expected contract life. Included in G&A expense.

leases.type: Sales-type leases for IT equipment to franchisees
leases.accounting: Net investment in leases at PV of future payments. Sales price = carrying value — no interest income recognized.

cash_and_equivalents.definition: Cash on hand, demand deposits, short-term highly liquid investments with original maturities ≤3 months

accounts_receivable.composition: Franchise fees (royalties), system service fees, other amounts from franchisees
accounts_receivable.allowance: Made when collection considered doubtful. Based on historical collection and business forecasts. Immaterial in 2024 and 2023.

income_taxes.status: LLC — not subject to federal income taxes. May be subject to state and local taxes in certain jurisdictions.

esa_management_llc.relationship: Manager under services agreement. Non-economic co-managers are affiliates of Eagle Strategies owners.

overhead_services.description: Executive mgmt, accounting, biz dev, financial analysis, training, technology

strategies_branding_llc.relationship: Trademark owner, wholly-owned subsidiary of Member

esh_hospitality_inc.relationship: Affiliate (ESH REIT). Owners are affiliates of Eagle Strategies owners.
esh_hospitality_inc.2022_reimbursement: Reimbursed $0.5M for brand launch franchisee payments

brand_launch_expenses.description: ESA Select Suites brand launch — $2.5M in payments to existing franchisees for area-of-protection exemptions
brand_launch_expenses.satisfaction_method: Net reduction in franchise fees paid by applicable franchisees
brand_launch_expenses.error_note: 2022 balance sheet had $1.9M classified as current instead of non-current — immaterial, not restated

contract_liabilities.description: Advance consideration from initial franchise fees and system implementation fees
